recommendations.name: Gitea PR review skill
recommendations.purpose: Review Gitea pull requests, post actionable findings, and apply configured review labels.
searchQueries: site:docs.gitea.com Gitea pull request reviews API
site:docs.gitea.com Gitea Actions status checks
recommendations.notes: Copy from the repository skill source; do not install by command.

recommendations.name: Browser E2E QA plugin
recommendations.purpose: Open local or deployed web targets, inspect pages, capture screenshots, and verify user-facing QA flows.
recommendations.source: manual:Codex Browser plugin or equivalent local browser automation configuration
recommendations.validation: Open the target site in the in-app browser and capture a smoke-test screenshot.
searchQueries: site:playwright.dev/docs Playwright best practices user visible assertions
recommendations.notes: Manual plugin configuration only; do not write secrets or install plugins automatically.

recommendations.name: Playwright frontend testing skill
recommendations.purpose: Run focused browser checks for layout, interaction, console errors, responsive behavior, traces, and screenshots.
searchQueries: site:playwright.dev/docs Playwright best practices
site:playwright.dev/docs Playwright test agents skills
recommendations.notes: Copy from the repository skill source; do not install by command.

recommendations.name: .NET 10 platform guidance
recommendations.purpose: Keep SDK, target framework, CLI, and ASP.NET Core guidance aligned with the .NET 10 stack.
recommendations.validation: Confirm docs/development.md and openspec/config.yaml mention .NET 10 and official-first Microsoft guidance.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com .NET 10 overview
site:learn.microsoft.com global.json .NET 10 rollForward
recommendations.notes: Use for research and docs alignment; no tool installation is implied.

recommendations.name: Blazor application practices guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide Blazor-specific UI, routing, component, and test decisions using official ASP.NET Core documentation.
recommendations.validation: Confirm Blazor stack intent remains documented in docs/development.md and OpenSpec context.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com aspnet core Blazor components routing .NET 10
recommendations.notes: Prefer generated framework conventions over hand-crafted framework plumbing.

recommendations.name: Modern .NET architecture guidance
recommendations.purpose: Use official Microsoft architecture guidance for clean boundaries, simple layering, and maintainable ASP.NET Core application structure.
recommendations.validation: Confirm docs/development.md describes code-practice defaults without over-prescribing architecture.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com .NET clean architecture ASP.NET Core
site:learn.microsoft.com modern web applications ASP.NET Core Azure architecture
recommendations.notes: Apply proportionally to this repo's size; avoid broad refactors unless a ticket requires them.

recommendations.name: Clean code practice guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide small, readable, testable code changes with clear names, focused responsibilities, low surprise, and proportional refactoring.
recommendations.validation: Confirm implementation and review guidance prefer simple focused changes, meaningful names, and tests over broad speculative refactors.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com C# coding conventions clean code
site:learn.microsoft.com .NET architecture separation of concerns
recommendations.notes: Use as a general engineering standard; no tool installation is implied.

recommendations.name: REST API design practice guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide HTTP semantics, route shape, validation, ProblemDetails responses, OpenAPI metadata, and integration-test expectations.
recommendations.validation: Confirm API work records observable behavior and tests status codes, payload shape, validation errors, and auth boundaries.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com ASP.NET Core Web API ProblemDetails
site:learn.microsoft.com ASP.NET Core OpenAPI integration tests
recommendations.notes: Pair with dotnet-webapi when that skill exists locally.

recommendations.name: QA automation practice guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide unit, integration, coverage, browser-visible QA, evidence capture, and failure triage expectations.
recommendations.validation: Confirm QA guidance includes focused assertions, coverage threshold checks, browser evidence when configured, and actionable failure reports.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com dotnet test best practices
site:playwright.dev/docs Playwright best practices assertions traces
recommendations.notes: Use with assertion-quality and Playwright skills when present.

recommendations.name: Security review standard guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide secure-by-default reviews for secrets, auth, authorization, input validation, dependency risk, logging, and OWASP risks.
recommendations.validation: Confirm security-sensitive work checks secrets, auth boundaries, validation, dependency scan output, and logging safety.
searchQueries: site:owasp.org ASVS application security verification
site:learn.microsoft.com ASP.NET Core security authentication authorization
recommendations.notes: Pair with security-best-practices when that skill exists locally.

recommendations.name: PR review practice guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide review findings toward behavioral bugs, missing tests, security risks, CI drift, and actionable comments.
recommendations.validation: Confirm PR reviews prioritize correctness, tests, security, deployment risk, and current-head labels before handoff.
searchQueries: site:docs.gitea.com Gitea pull request review comments API
site:docs.gitea.com Gitea Actions status checks
recommendations.notes: Use with gitea-pr-review-agent and review-feedback workflow skills.

recommendations.name: Release practice guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide build-once artifact promotion, release manifest integrity, environment evidence, tag consistency, and explicit PROD promotion.
recommendations.validation: Confirm DEV, QA, and PROD use the same Nexus ZIP artifact and release.json lineage without rebuilding.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com Azure App Service zip deploy
site:help.sonatype.com Nexus Repository REST API raw hosted
recommendations.notes: Use for deploy and PROD promotion decisions; credentials remain local-only.

recommendations.name: Rollback practice guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide production rollback to a known-good immutable artifact without rebuilding or rewriting main.
recommendations.validation: Confirm rollback chooses a verified Nexus artifact, preserves release lineage, verifies PROD health, and records follow-up ownership.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com Azure App Service zip deploy rollback
site:help.sonatype.com Nexus Repository REST API raw hosted checksum
recommendations.notes: Use rollback before hotfix when a known-good artifact exists.

recommendations.name: Gitea Actions and API guidance
recommendations.purpose: Keep Gitea PR, Actions, runner, token, and status-check behavior aligned with official Gitea documentation.
recommendations.validation: Confirm configure references and PR workflow docs use current Gitea Actions/API terminology.
searchQueries: site:docs.gitea.com Gitea Actions runner
site:docs.gitea.com Gitea API pull requests reviews
recommendations.notes: Use Gitea API through configured local client tools; do not read secrets from containers.

recommendations.name: Nexus artifact API guidance
recommendations.purpose: Keep artifact upload, checksum, manifest, and QA evidence publication behavior aligned with Nexus Repository guidance.
recommendations.validation: Confirm Nexus references preserve app/{commitSha}/ artifact identity and release.json handling.
searchQueries: site:help.sonatype.com Nexus Repository REST API raw hosted upload checksum
recommendations.notes: Nexus is mandatory for DEV, QA, PROD, and rollback artifact lineage.

recommendations.name: Azure App Service ZIP deploy guidance
recommendations.purpose: Keep App Service ZIP deployment guidance aligned with the current Azure deployment surface.
recommendations.validation: Confirm deployment docs and workflows continue to deploy the existing Nexus ZIP without rebuilding.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com Azure App Service deploy zip az webapp deploy
recommendations.notes: Use for deployment guidance only; Azure credentials remain user-supplied secrets.

recommendations.name: Prometheus configuration guidance
recommendations.purpose: Keep scrape target, health, and local monitoring configuration aligned with Prometheus documentation.
recommendations.validation: Confirm observability references keep tracked templates placeholder-safe and real Azure targets local-only.
searchQueries: site:prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration scrape_config targets
recommendations.notes: Do not write real Azure hostnames into tracked Prometheus templates.

recommendations.name: Grafana provisioning guidance
recommendations.purpose: Keep datasource and dashboard provisioning aligned with Grafana's file-provisioning behavior.
recommendations.validation: Confirm Grafana provisioning files remain tracked templates without secret-bearing values.
searchQueries: site:grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest provisioning datasources dashboards Prometheus
recommendations.notes: Provisioned dashboard JSON should visualize Prometheus data without embedding credentials.

notRecommended.name: Plane MCP
notRecommended.reason: Plane MCP is intentionally not recommended for this delivery flow; repo-local skills must use the configured Plane API and never Plane MCP, containers, or direct databases for ticket delivery.
